content.en:
After such an operation by the human race, all the racial creatures in the human domain were moved to the Taisu Domain, as if the past Wuji Domain had been replaced by the Taisu Domain.

And the Terrans completely occupy the Terran Domain, and the infinite territories are all subordinate to the Terrans, and there are no other forces and races.

Of course.

In the future, some other races will definitely be born, but as long as they are slightly transformed, it is impossible to give birth to other powerful races, and even if they are born, they will only be reduced to the sparring objects of the weak human race.

On the whole, the entire human domain already belongs to the human race.

......

this day.

Ye Tian began to transform the human domain.

As a patriarch, his authority is very high, and he naturally knows a way to transform the Innate Origin Domain Alliance-Ten Thousand Heavy Creation Array!

This is a large array that many elders have spent a long time researching, and it requires a huge amount of resources, once it is built, it can quickly improve the origin of an innate origin domain, and it can also form a terrifying defense.

Some legends have it that when they reach the Dao Realm, they can mobilize the Ten Thousand Heavy Creation Array to resist the attacks of ordinary patriarchs, so that the Innate Origin Domain will not be destroyed.

For example, the Sword Clan has arranged a Ten Thousand Heavy Creation Boundary Array, even if the Sword Clan Patriarch has fallen, but with such a formation, the Sword Clan is not afraid of ordinary Patriarchs.

Ye Tian was worth a lot, so there was naturally no problem in arranging a Ten Thousand Heavy Creation Boundary Array.

Soon, Ye Tian prepared the materials and began to arrange the Ten Thousand Heavy Creation Array.

After some time, the Ten Thousand Heavy Creation Array was arranged.

Followed by.

Ye Tian began to build fortresses outside the human domain, using these fortresses to protect the human domain, just like the Su domain, he also built fortresses outside the Su domain.

These fortresses will be controlled by the strong men of the human race.

After another period of time, the Ten Thousand Worlds Creation Array and the fortresses were established.

......

"Now that the human race is developing steadily, I don't have to worry about it, and I have to work hard to improve my strength next!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And Ye Tian's duplicate bodies are also exploring various treasures, such as the legendary bitter sea and other treasure lands, and he has also been looking for resources in them to improve his strength.

Although the harvest is not too much, but over time, the accumulated resources are also extremely rich.

this day.

A copy of Ye Tian's body searched for resources in the legendary bitter sea, and gradually came to the deepest part of the legendary bitter sea, the legendary bitter beast here is very powerful, and ordinary elders enter here to find death.

But even if Ye Tian is now suppressed by the Legendary Sea of Bitterness, he has comprehended the rules of the first sequence of supreme paths, and has mastered so many mythical bodies, how terrifying his physical body is, so that he can survive here.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's copying talent sensed the existence of an elder.

"The Third Elder - Shadow Dust!"

At this time.

The third elder also sensed Ye Tian's existence and looked at it.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled over.

"I've seen the Third Elder!"

Ye Tian said politely.

The third elder Ying Chen looked at Ye Tian and said with a smile: "You should be Ye Tian, the new elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!"

Although the third patriarch has been staying in the sea of legends, he has always mastered the information and intelligence of the outside world, but he has not been able to get the latest information in time.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, and immediately looked in front of the third elder.

I saw that there was a strange legendary bitter beast there, which solidified and wrapped its body around an island, forming an impregnable defense, and the third patriarch also trapped the other party, preventing the other party from escaping, and kept attacking this legendary bitter beast.

"Third Elder, have you been trapping this Legendary Bitter Beast here?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"That's good!" said the third elder, "There is one item I need in this legendary bitter beast's lair, but unfortunately the defense of this legendary bitter beast is too strong, and I can only rely on the long years to wear out its body little by little. "

Being able to let the Third Elder stay here all the time to wipe out this legendary bitter beast shows how precious the things in it are.

But this place has been occupied by the third patriarch, and the other patriarchs will not come to rob it.

Besides, many patriarchs know that the third patriarch is here, and there is no need to hide it.

"That's right, Elder Ye Tian, don't go to the position of the Legendary Bitter Sea!" The third patriarch pointed out a direction and said: "There is a very terrifying legendary bitter beast there, in the other party's territory, there are many powers of the legendary bitter sea that can be mobilized, even if it is me, it is not an opponent, and the other party is good at sealing methods, there are three elders who have been sealed by the other party, and they have not been able to get out of the trap so far!"

"The three patriarchs are sealed?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Could it be that even the First Elder can't deal with it?" Ye Tian asked.

"That's not it!" said the Third Patriarch, "The strength of the First Patriarch is very strong, and he should be able to deal with that Legendary Bitter Beast, but if something happens, the First Patriarch will not come here, and he will not take risks for the sake of the three Patriarchs." "

"Thank you for the reminder!"

Ye Tiandao.

......

Legend has it that in the depths of the bitter sea.

Ye Tian went straight to the position that the third elder said, he was full of curiosity at the moment.

Although it was very dangerous there, he was not afraid of encountering danger, and it was just a big deal to lose a replica body.

Soon, he came to the territory of the legendary bitter beast with the ability to seal.

As soon as Ye Tian stepped into this area, an extremely strange-looking legendary bitter beast appeared, the other party had a dense sealing formation on his body, and his head was as deep and terrifying as an abyss.

【Abyssal Ten Thousand Skulls】

This is the name of the other party.

In an instant, Ye Tian's surroundings were blocked.

Immediately afterward, one seal after another struck, and these seals were impressively composed of the first sequence of supreme dao rules.

Ye Tian used the first sequence of supreme rules to compete, but his strength was not as good as the other party, and the power of the legendary bitter sea mobilized by the other party was too much, so he easily sealed Ye Tian's copy body.

I saw that Ye Tian's replica body turned into a statue and fell from the legendary bitter sea to the bottom of the sea.

Legend has it that the bitter sea is at the bottom of the sea.

Ye Tian saw three statues of the elders and six statues of the Demon Venerable.

Coupled with his words, it means that the Ten Mythical Supreme Dao Realms have been sealed here.

Now.

His body was sealed, but his consciousness was still relatively clear, and he could even communicate with the outside world.

"Another hapless patriarch!"

"The outside world should know the information here, why are there still patriarchs here looking for death?"

"Maybe it's curious, I think there is a chance here, so here I come again!"

"Anyway, this veteran should be a new veteran, I've never seen it!"

"Hahaha, your Innate Origin Domain Alliance has been sealed with another elder!"

Ye Tian could naturally hear the conversations of these patriarchs and demon venerables.

"Hello everyone!"

Ye Tian greeted.

He was in no hurry to disperse the replica body, wanting to see if there were any other opportunities here.
